title: nigella arvensis var. intermedia
intro: Nigella arvensis var. intermedia, also known as wild fennel or intermediate black cumin, is a variant of the Nigella arvensis plant, belonging to the Ranunculaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nigella arvensis var. intermedia include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
